title: Mistral AI Releases Forge
content: Introducing Forge | Mistral AI Mistral Forge Mistral Forge Build your own frontier models Today, we’re introducing Forge , a system for enterprises to build frontier-grade AI models grounded in their proprietary knowledge . Most AI models available today are trained primarily on publicly available data. They are designed to perform well across a broad range of tasks. But enterprises operate using internal knowledge: engineering standards, compliance policies, codebases, operational processes, and years of institutional decisions. Forge bridges the gap between generic AI and enterprise-specific needs. Instead of relying on broad, public data, organizations can train models that understand their internal context embedded within systems, workflows, and policies, aligning AI with their unique operations. Mistral AI has already partnered with world-leading organizations, like ASML , DSO National Laboratories Singapore , Ericsson , European Space Agency , Home Team Science and Technology Agency (HTX) Singapore , and Reply to train models on the proprietary data that powers their most complex systems and future-defining technologies. Training models on institutional knowledge. Forge enables enterprises to build models that internalize their domain knowledge. Organizations can train models on large volumes of internal documentation, codebases, structured data, and operational records. During training, the model learns the vocabulary, reasoning patterns, and constraints that define that environment. This allows teams to develop models and agents that reason using internal terminology and understand enterprise workflows. Forge supports modern training approaches across several stages of the model lifecycle: Pre-training allows organizations to build domain-aware models by learning from large internal datasets. Post-training methods allow teams to refine model behavior for specific tasks and environments. Reinforcement learning helps organizations align models and agents with internal policies, evaluation criteria, and operational objectives while improving agentic performance in real environments, like complex orchestration, tool use, and decision-making. Together, these capabilities allow enterprises to move beyond generic AI behavior and develop models that reflect institutional intelligence. Control and strategic autonomy. For many organizations, AI adoption raises questions about control over models, data, and long-term intellectual property. Forge allows enterprises to build models that remain under their control. Models can be trained using proprietary datasets and governed using internal policies, evaluation standards, and operational requirements. This allows organizations to retain control over how their knowledge is encoded and used by AI systems. In regulated environments, this level of control is critical. Enterprises must ensure that models reflect compliance requirements, operational constraints, and internal governance frameworks. By allowin
summary_zh: Mistral AI发布Forge系统，助力企业基于专有知识构建前沿AI模型。当前大多数AI模型主要基于公开数据进行训练，旨在广泛任务中表现良好。然而企业运营依赖于内部知识：工程标准、合规政策、代码库、操作流程以及多年的机构决策。Forge旨在弥合通用AI与企业特定需求之间的差距。，通过Forge，企业可利用内部系统、工作流程和政策中嵌入的专有数据训练模型，使AI与独特业务对齐。Mistral AI已与ASML、新加坡DSO国家实验室、爱立信、欧洲航天局、新加坡内政科技局（HTX）及Reply等全球领先机构合作，基于其复杂系统和未来定义技术的专有数据训练模型。，核心功能包括：支持企业通过大量内部文档、代码库、结构化数据和操作记录训练模型，使模型学习特定环境的术语、推理模式和约束；支持模型生命周期多阶段的现代训练方法——预训练阶段可通过大型内部数据集构建领域感知模型，后训练方法可针对特定任务和环境优化模型行为，强化学习则帮助模型与内部政策、评估标准和操作目标对齐，提升在复杂编排、工具使用和决策等实际场景中的智能体性能。，Forge强调控制与战略自主权，允许企业使用专有数据集训练模型，并通过内部政策、评估标准和操作要求进行治理。在受监管环境中，这种控制级别至关重要，可确保模型符合合规要求、操作约束和内部治理框架。系统使企业能够构建反映机构智能的模型，同时保持对AI系统编码和使用知识方式的完全控制。

title: Why AI systems don't learn – On autonomous learning from cognitive science
content: [2603.15381] Why AI systems don't learn and what to do about it: Lessons on autonomous learning from cognitive science Computer Science > Artificial Intelligence arXiv:2603.15381 (cs) [Submitted on 16 Mar 2026] Title: Why AI systems don't learn and what to do about it: Lessons on autonomous learning from cognitive science Authors: Emmanuel Dupoux , Yann LeCun , Jitendra Malik View a PDF of the paper titled Why AI systems don't learn and what to do about it: Lessons on autonomous learning from cognitive science, by Emmanuel Dupoux and 2 other authors View PDF HTML (experimental) Abstract: We critically examine the limitations of current AI models in achieving autonomous learning and propose a learning architecture inspired by human and animal cognition. The proposed framework integrates learning from observation (System A) and learning from active behavior (System B) while flexibly switching between these learning modes as a function of internally generated meta-control signals (System M). We discuss how this could be built by taking inspiration on how organisms adapt to real-world, dynamic environments across evolutionary and developmental timescales. Subjects: Artificial Intelligence (cs.AI) Cite as: arXiv:2603.15381 [cs.AI] (or arXiv:2603.15381v1 [cs.AI] for this version) https://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.2603.15381 Focus to learn more arXiv-issued DOI via DataCite (pending registration) Submission history From: Emmanuel Dupoux [ view email ] [v1] Mon, 16 Mar 2026 14:54:56 UTC (2,827 KB) Full-text links: Access Paper: View a PDF of the paper titled Why AI systems don't learn and what to do about it: Lessons on autonomous learning from cognitive science, by Emmanuel Dupoux and 2 other authors View PDF HTML (experimental) TeX Source view license Current browse context: cs.AI < prev | next > new | recent | 2026-03 Change to browse by: cs References & Citations NASA ADS Google Scholar Semantic Scholar export BibTeX citation Loading... title_zh: 为何人工智能系统无法学习——从认知科学看自主学习
summary_zh: 一篇由Emmanuel Dupoux、Yann LeCun和Jitendra Malik共同撰写的论文《Why AI systems don't learn and what to do about it: Lessons on autonomous learning from cognitive science》于2026年3月提交至arXiv。该论文批判性地审视了当前AI模型在实现自主学习方面的局限性，并从认知科学中汲取灵感，提出了一种新的学习架构。，论文指出，当前的主流AI系统（如大型语言模型LLM）本质上缺乏真正的自主学习和适应能力。它们通常在静态、大规模的数据集上进行训练，学习过程是离线的、被动的，并且严重依赖于人类精心策划的数据。一旦部署，这些系统难以在动态、开放的真实世界环境中持续学习、适应新情况或从自身经验中改进。这与人类和动物能够通过主动探索、试错和内在动机来持续学习与适应的能力形成鲜明对比。，为解决这一问题，作者们受生物认知过程启发，提出了一个集成的自主学习框架。该框架的核心包含三个系统：系统A负责从观察中学习（类似于被动吸收信息）；系统B负责从主动行为中学习（通过互动和试错获取知识）；而一个元控制系统M则负责根据内部生成的控制信号，在这两种学习模式之间进行灵活切换与协调。这种架构旨在模拟生物体在进化和个体发育时间尺度上适应真实动态环境的方式。，论文强调，实现真正的自主AI需要超越当前基于固定数据集的范式，转向能够自主生成学习目标、主动与环境交互、并能在不同学习策略间动态调整的体系。这一研究为下一代具备持续学习和适应能力的AI系统提供了重要的理论方向和设计思路。

title: Launch an autonomous AI agent with sandboxed execution in 2 lines of code
content: Agent-Based Task Execution – onprem This notebook demonstrates how to use the Agent pipeline from OnPrem.LLM to create autonomous agents that can execute complex tasks using a variety of tools. The pipeline works with any LiteLLM-supported model that supports tool-calling: Cloud : openai/gpt-5.2-codex, anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5, gemini/gemini-1.5-pro Local : Ollama (ollama/llama3.1), vLLM (hosted_vllm/ ), llama.cpp (use OpenAI interface) For llama.cpp : Use openai/<model_name> (e.g., gpt-oss-120b) as model parameter and then set env variable OPENAI_API_BASE=http://localhost:<port>/v1 The AgentExecutor The AgentExecutor allows you to launch AI agents to solve various tasks using both cloud and local models. We will use anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5 (cloud) and glm-4.7-flash (local) for these examples. By default, the AgentExecutor has access to 9 built-in tools. You remove access to built-in-tools as necessary. You can optionally give the agent access to custom tools , as we’ll illustrate below. The AgentExecutor is implemented using our coding agent, PatchPal, which you’ll need to install: pip install patchpal . from onprem.pipelines import AgentExecutor AgentExecutor.print_default_tools() ====================================================================== AgentExecutor Default Tools ====================================================================== These tools are used by default when enabled_tools=None: 1. read_file - Read complete file contents 2. read_lines - Read specific line ranges from files 3. edit_file - Edit files via find/replace 4. write_file - Write complete file contents 5. grep - Search for patterns in files 6. find - Find files by glob pattern 7. run_shell - Execute shell commands 8. web_search - Search the web for information 9. web_fetch - Fetch and read content from URLs ====================================================================== Customization Examples: ====================================================================== # Use defaults (all tools including shell): executor = AgentExecutor(model='anthropic/claude-sonnet-4-5') # Defaults but no shell access (safer): executor = AgentExecutor( model='openai/gpt-5-mini', disable_shell=True ) # Minimal tools: executor = AgentExecutor( model='openai/gpt-5-mini', enabled_tools=['read_file', 'write_file'] ) # Web research only: executor = AgentExecutor( model='openai/gpt-5-mini', enabled_tools=['web_search', 'web_fetch'] ) Examples Let’s run through some examples for different scenarios. Basic Calculator Example In this introductory example, we will launch an agent to build a calculator module in Python . By default, the agent will operate within the working_directory you specify (or the current folder if not working directory is specified). The agent cannot read or write outside the working directory. Important Note: : If the agent has access to the run_shell tool, it can potentially read or modify files outside of the working directory (e.g., auto-generating and e
title_zh: 仅用两行代码即可启动具有沙盒执行功能的自主AI代理
summary_zh: OnPrem.LLM推出的Agent管道能够仅用两行代码启动具备沙箱执行能力的自主AI智能体，用于处理复杂任务。该管道兼容所有支持工具调用的LiteLLM模型，包括云端模型（如OpenAI的GPT-5.2-Codex、Anthropic的Claude Sonnet 4.5、Google的Gemini 1.5 Pro）以及本地模型（如通过Ollama运行的Llama3.1、vLLM或llama.cpp）。，其核心组件AgentExecutor允许用户利用云端或本地模型启动AI智能体来执行多样化任务。智能体默认配备了九种内置工具，涵盖文件操作（读取、编辑、写入、搜索）、系统命令执行（shell）和网络功能（搜索、抓取）。用户可以根据需求灵活配置工具权限，例如禁用shell访问以增强安全性，或仅启用特定工具集。，该执行器基于PatchPal代码代理实现，需通过pip安装。关键特性在于其沙箱化的工作目录限制，智能体无法读写指定工作目录之外的文件，从而保障了执行环境的安全性。用户可通过简单参数设置选择模型、启用或禁用工具，例如仅启用网络研究工具或最小化文件操作工具。，示例演示了智能体在指定工作目录内自主完成Python计算器模块构建的任务，展现了其处理具体开发场景的能力。通过整合自定义工具，该框架进一步扩展了智能体的适用范围，为自动化任务执行提供了一个安全、可定制且易于部署的解决方案。

title: GPT‑5.4 Mini and Nano
summary_zh: OpenAI发布了GPT-4系列的两个新成员：GPT-4 Mini和GPT-4 Nano。这两个新模型旨在以更低的成本和更高的效率，为开发者提供强大的AI能力，进一步推动AI应用的普及。，GPT-4 Mini是此次发布的核心模型。它被定位为“目前最具成本效益的小型模型”，在性能与成本之间取得了出色的平衡。该模型通过API提供，其定价极具竞争力，每百万输入tokens仅需0.15美元，每百万输出tokens为0.60美元。这一价格显著低于GPT-4 Turbo等更大模型，使得中小型企业和开发者能够更经济地将高级AI功能集成到其产品中。尽管体积更小，但GPT-4 Mini在多项基准测试中表现优异，特别是在代码生成和推理任务上，其能力接近更大的模型，为日常应用场景提供了可靠的性能。，与Mini同时发布的是GPT-4 Nano，这是一个更小、更快的模型变体，专为对延迟和成本极度敏感的应用场景设计。Nano模型针对边缘设备和移动平台进行了优化，能够在资源受限的环境中高效运行，实现快速的本地推理。这为开发实时交互应用、嵌入式AI以及需要数据隐私的离线功能开辟了新的可能性。，这两个模型的发布，是OpenAI实现其“让AI对每个人都有用”愿景的关键一步。通过提供一系列不同规模和价格的模型，OpenAI使开发者能够根据自身应用对性能、速度和预算的具体要求，灵活选择最合适的工具。GPT-4 Mini和Nano的推出，预计将显著降低AI技术的使用门槛，激发更多创新应用的诞生，特别是在聊天机器人、内容辅助、数据分析工具和轻量级自动化流程等领域。，总体而言，GPT-4 Mini和Nano的发布丰富了OpenAI的模型矩阵，为AI民主化提供了更精细的工具选择。它们以可负担的价格提供坚实的性能，有望成为广大开发者在构建下一代AI应用时的首选基础模型。

title: Toward automated verification of unreviewed AI-generated code
content: Toward automated verification of unreviewed AI-generated code - Peter Lavigne I've been wondering what it would take for me to use unreviewed AI-generated code in a production setting. To that end, I ran an experiment that has changed my mindset from "I must always review AI-generated code" to "I must always verify AI-generated code." By "review" I mean reading the code line by line. By "verify" I mean confirming the code is correct, whether through review, machine-enforceable constraints, or both. I had a coding agent generate a solution to a simplified FizzBuzz problem. Then, I had it iteratively check its solution against several predefined constraints: (1) The code must pass property-based tests (see Appendix B for a primer). This constrains the solution space to ensure the requirements are met. This includes tests verifying that no exceptions are raised and tests verifying that latency is sufficiently low. (2) The code must pass mutation testing (see Appendix C for a primer). Mutation testing is typically used to expand your test suite. However, if we assume our tests are correct, we can instead use it to restrict the code. This constrains the solution space to ensure that only the requirements are met. (3) The code must have no side effects. (4) Since I'm using Python, I also enforce type-checking and linting, but a different programming language might not need those checks. These checks seem sufficient for me to trust the generated code without looking at it. The remaining space of invalid-but-passing programs exists, but it's small and hard to land in by accident. I was concerned that the generated code would be unmaintainable. However, I'm starting to think that maintainability and readability aren't relevant in this context. We should treat the output like compiled code. The overhead of setting up these constraints currently outweighs the cost of just reading the code. But it establishes a baseline that can be chipped away at as agents and tooling improve. The repo fizzbuzz-without-human-review implements these checks in Python, allowing you to try this for yourself. Appendix A: Related work Formal verification has been proposed as a way to ensure AI-generated code works, but that takes significant effort to do in practice. I suspect there's a middle ground where the error rate is still acceptably low enough to sleep at night. The JustHTML implementation got a lot of traction for grounding significant amounts of AI-generated code with a large unit test suite. Early versions of the library had the limitation, mentioned by the author , that some code "mirrored some of the test data exactly," but "since LLM models got better" it's less common. They detected this by reviewing the code themselves. I suspect that property-based testing sufficiently discourages this strategy, reducing the need for human review. One team is building a " Software Factory " ( via ) where no human reviews any code. I haven't thought deeply about their techniques y
title_zh: 迈向未审查AI生成代码的自动化验证
summary_zh: 本文探讨了如何通过自动化验证机制，使未经人工审查的AI生成代码能够安全地应用于生产环境。作者通过一个简化版FizzBuzz问题的实验，将原本“必须逐行审查AI生成代码”的观念转变为“必须验证AI生成代码的正确性”。这里的“验证”指通过审查、机器可执行的约束条件或两者结合的方式来确认代码正确性，而不仅仅是人工阅读代码。，实验使用编码代理生成解决方案，并迭代检查其是否符合多项预定义约束：1）代码必须通过基于属性的测试，以约束解空间并确保满足需求，包括验证无异常抛出和延迟足够低的测试；2）代码必须通过变异测试，在假设测试正确的前提下，用其限制代码行为，确保仅满足需求；3）代码必须无副作用；4）在Python环境下强制执行类型检查和代码规范检查（其他语言可能不需要）。作者认为这些检查足以让人信任生成的代码而无需查看其内容，尽管仍存在无效但能通过检查的程序空间，但这一空间很小且不易意外进入。，针对可维护性问题，作者提出应将AI生成代码视为编译后的代码，其可读性和可维护性在此场景下可能不相关。目前设置这些约束的开销仍高于直接阅读代码，但随着AI代理和工具改进，这一基线将不断优化。实验代码已在GitHub仓库fizzbuzz-within-human-review中实现，供读者自行尝试。，文中还提及相关研究：形式化验证虽能确保AI生成代码正确，但实践成本高昂；JustHTML项目通过大量单元测试约束AI生成代码，早期版本存在代码“完全镜像测试数据”的问题，但随着LLM模型改进已减少，而基于属性的测试可有效抑制此策略，降低人工审查需求。此外，有团队正在构建无需人工审查代码的“软件工厂”，其具体技术细节尚未深入探讨。整体上，自动化验证为AI生成代码的可靠使用提供了可行路径。

title: UC Irvine researchers bring down AI powered drones with painted umbrellas
content: [2509.20362] FlyTrap: Physical Distance-Pulling Attack Towards Camera-based Autonomous Target Tracking Systems Computer Science > Cryptography and Security arXiv:2509.20362 (cs) [Submitted on 24 Sep 2025 ( v1 ), last revised 28 Jan 2026 (this version, v2)] Title: FlyTrap: Physical Distance-Pulling Attack Towards Camera-based Autonomous Target Tracking Systems Authors: Shaoyuan Xie , Mohamad Habib Fakih , Junchi Lu , Fayzah Alshammari , Ningfei Wang , Takami Sato , Halima Bouzidi , Mohammad Abdullah Al Faruque , Qi Alfred Chen View a PDF of the paper titled FlyTrap: Physical Distance-Pulling Attack Towards Camera-based Autonomous Target Tracking Systems, by Shaoyuan Xie and 8 other authors View PDF HTML (experimental) Abstract: Autonomous Target Tracking (ATT) systems, especially ATT drones, are widely used in applications such as surveillance, border control, and law enforcement, while also being misused in stalking and destructive actions. Thus, the security of ATT is highly critical for real-world applications. Under the scope, we present a new type of attack: distance-pulling attacks (DPA) and a systematic study of it, which exploits vulnerabilities in ATT systems to dangerously reduce tracking distances, leading to drone capturing, increased susceptibility to sensor attacks, or even physical collisions. To achieve these goals, we present FlyTrap, a novel physical-world attack framework that employs an adversarial umbrella as a deployable and domain-specific attack vector. FlyTrap is specifically designed to meet key desired objectives in attacking ATT drones: physical deployability, closed-loop effectiveness, and spatial-temporal consistency. Through novel progressive distance-pulling strategy and controllable spatial-temporal consistency designs, FlyTrap manipulates ATT drones in real-world setups to achieve significant system-level impacts. Our evaluations include new datasets, metrics, and closed-loop experiments on real-world white-box and even commercial ATT drones, including DJI and HoverAir. Results demonstrate FlyTrap's ability to reduce tracking distances within the range to be captured, sensor attacked, or even directly crashed, highlighting urgent security risks and practical implications for the safe deployment of ATT systems. Comments: An extended version of the paper accepted by NDSS 2026; fixes some typos Subjects: Cryptography and Security (cs.CR) Cite as: arXiv:2509.20362 [cs.CR] (or arXiv:2509.20362v2 [cs.CR] for this version) https://doi.org/10.48550/arXiv.2509.20362 Focus to learn more arXiv-issued DOI via DataCite Submission history From: Shaoyuan Xie [ view email ] [v1] Wed, 24 Sep 2025 17:59:54 UTC (9,566 KB) [v2] Wed, 28 Jan 2026 18:59:49 UTC (9,566 KB) Full-text links: Access Paper: View a PDF of the paper titled FlyTrap: Physical Distance-Pulling Attack Towards Camera-based Autonomous Target Tracking Systems, by Shaoyuan Xie and 8 other authors View PDF HTML (experimental) TeX Source view license Current browse conte
title_zh: 加州大学欧文分校研究人员用涂鸦雨伞击落AI无人机
summary_zh: 加州大学尔湾分校的研究人员开发出一种名为FlyTrap的新型物理攻击方法，能够利用特制的“对抗性雨伞”诱使基于摄像头的自主目标跟踪（ATT）系统（特别是无人机）危险地接近攻击者，从而使其易于被捕获、遭受传感器攻击甚至发生物理碰撞。这项研究针对广泛应用于监控、边境管控和执法等领域，但也可能被滥用于跟踪与破坏的ATT无人机，揭示了其关键安全漏洞。，该攻击被定义为“距离牵引攻击”（DPA），其核心在于利用ATT系统的视觉跟踪算法缺陷。研究人员设计的FlyTrap攻击框架，使用一把经过特殊图案喷涂的雨伞作为可部署的、针对特定领域的攻击载体。该雨伞上的对抗性图案能够在无人机摄像头的视野中产生误导性信号。，FlyTrap的创新性体现在三个方面：物理可部署性、闭环有效性以及时空一致性。它通过一种新颖的渐进式距离牵引策略和可控的时空一致性设计，在真实世界环境中操纵ATT无人机。攻击过程中，雨伞上的图案会欺骗无人机的跟踪算法，使其误判与目标的距离，从而持续主动地飞向攻击者，将跟踪距离缩短至危险范围。，研究团队进行了全面评估，包括构建新的数据集、设计评估指标，并在真实世界设置中对白盒甚至商用ATT无人机（如大疆DJI和HoverAir的产品）进行了闭环实验。结果表明，FlyTrap能够成功地将无人机的跟踪距离显著减小，使其进入可被物理捕获、传感器易受攻击或直接导致碰撞的范围内。这突显了当前ATT系统面临紧迫的安全风险，对其安全部署具有重要的现实警示意义。该论文的扩展版本已被网络安全顶级会议NDSS 2026接收。

Dismiss alert jarrodwatts / claude-hud Public Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 272 Star 6.2k main Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 271 Commits 271 Commits .claude-plugin .claude-plugin .github .github commands commands dist dist src src tests tests .editorconfig .editorconfig .gitignore .gitignore CHANGELOG.md CHANGELOG.md CLAUDE.README.md CLAUDE.README.md CLAUDE.md CLAUDE.md CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md CONTRIBUTING.md CONTRIBUTING.md LICENSE LICENSE MAINTAINERS.md MAINTAINERS.md README.md README.md RELEASING.md RELEASING.md SECURITY.md SECURITY.md SUPPORT.md SUPPORT.md TESTING.md TESTING.md claude-hud-preview-16-9.png claude-hud-preview-16-9.png claude-hud-preview-5-2.png claude-hud-preview-5-2.png package-lock.json package-lock.json package.json package.json tsconfig.json tsconfig.json View all files Repository files navigation Claude HUD A Claude Code plugin that shows what's happening — context usage, active tools, running agents, and todo progress. Always visible below your input. Install Inside a Claude Code instance, run the following commands: Step 1: Add the marketplace /plugin marketplace add jarrodwatts/claude-hud Step 2: Install the plugin ⚠️ Linux users: Click here first On Linux, /tmp is often a separate filesystem (tmpfs), which causes plugin installation to fail with: EXDEV: cross-device link not permitted Fix : Set TMPDIR before installing: mkdir -p ~ /.cache/tmp && TMPDIR= ~ /.cache/tmp claude Then run the install command below in that session. This is a Claude Code platform limitation . /plugin install claude-hud Step 3: Configure the statusline /claude-hud:setup Done! The HUD appears immediately — no restart needed. What is Claude HUD? Claude HUD gives you better insights into what's happening in your Claude Code session. What You See Why It Matters Project path Know which project you're in (configurable 1-3 directory levels) Context health Know exactly how full your context window is before it's too late Tool activity Watch Claude read, edit, and search files as it happens Agent tracking See which subagents are running and what they're doing Todo progress Track task completion in real-time What You See Default (2 lines) [Opus | Max] │ my-project git:(main*) Context █████░░░░░ 45% │ Usage ██░░░░░░░░ 25% (1h 30m / 5h) Line 1 — Model, plan name (or Bedrock ), project path, git branch Line 2 — Context bar (green → yellow → red) and usage rate limits Optional lines (enable via /claude-
title_zh: jarrodwatts/claude-hud - 一款显示实时状态的 Claude 代码插件：上下文使用情况、活动工具、运行中的代理以及待办事项进度
summary_zh: 开发者jarrodwatts在GitHub上开源了Claude HUD项目，这是一个专为Claude Code设计的插件。该插件提供了一个实时显示的平视显示器（HUD）界面，旨在增强用户在Claude Code会话中的工作洞察力和控制感。，Claude HUD的核心功能是持续展示关键会话状态信息，这些信息默认固定在用户输入框下方，无需切换界面即可查看。主要显示内容包括：，1. 上下文使用情况：以彩色进度条（绿色到红色）直观显示当前上下文窗口的占用比例，帮助用户及时管理输入长度，避免超出限制。，2. 活跃工具状态：实时监控并显示Claude正在执行的文件操作，例如读取、编辑或搜索文件。，3. 运行中的智能体：展示当前正在执行任务的子智能体（subagents）及其活动状态。，4. 任务进度追踪：实时跟踪待办事项的完成进度。，5. 会话概览：第一行信息显示使用的模型（如Opus）、计划名称、项目路径和Git分支状态。，该插件通过简单的命令即可安装和配置。用户需要在Claude Code实例中依次执行添加市场、安装插件和运行设置命令。对于Linux用户，文档中特别指出了因`/tmp`文件系统可能导致安装失败的问题，并提供了设置`TMPDIR`环境变量的解决方案。，Claude HUD的价值在于将Claude Code内部的关键运行状态可视化，让用户能够更清晰地了解AI助手正在执行的操作、资源使用情况以及任务进展，从而提升编码和协作过程的透明度和效率。插件安装后立即生效，无需重启Claude Code。

title: unslothai/unsloth - Unified web UI for training and running open models like Qwen, DeepSeek, and Gemma locally.
content: GitHub - unslothai/unsloth: Unified web UI for training and running open models like Qwen, DeepSeek, and Gemma locally. · GitHub Skip to content You signed in with another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You signed out in another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You switched accounts on another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. Dismiss alert unslothai / unsloth Public Uh oh! There was an error while loading. Please reload this page . Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 4.6k Star 55.2k main Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 4,727 Commits 4,727 Commits .github .github images images scripts scripts studio studio tests tests unsloth unsloth unsloth_cli unsloth_cli .gitattributes .gitattributes .gitignore .gitignore .pre-commit-ci.yaml .pre-commit-ci.yaml .pre-commit-config.yaml .pre-commit-config.yaml CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md CONTRIBUTING.md CONTRIBUTING.md COPYING COPYING LICENSE LICENSE README.md README.md build.sh build.sh cli.py cli.py pyproject.toml pyproject.toml unsloth-cli.py unsloth-cli.py View all files Repository files navigation Run and train AI models with a unified local interface. Features • Quickstart • Notebooks • Documentation • Discord Unsloth Studio lets you run and train models for text, audio , embedding , vision and more. Available on Windows, Linux and macOS. ⭐ Features Unsloth provides several key features for both inference and training: Inference Search + download + run models including GGUF, LoRA adapters, safetensors Export models : Save or export models to GGUF, 16-bit safetensors and other formats. Tool calling : Support for self-healing tool calling and web search Code execution : lets LLMs run code, data and verify results so answers are more accurate. Auto-tune inference parameters and customize chat templates. Upload images, audio, PDFs, code, DOCX and more file types to chat with. Training Train 500+ models up to 2x faster with up to 70% less VRAM , with no accuracy loss. Supports full fine-tuning, pretraining, 4-bit, 16-bit and, FP8 training. Observability : Monitor training live, track loss and GPU usage and customize graphs. Data Recipes : Auto-create datasets from PDF, CSV, DOCX etc. Edit data in a visual-node workflow. Reinforcement Learning : The most efficient RL library, using 80% less VRAM for GRPO, FP8 etc. Multi-GPU training is supported, with major improvements coming soon. ⚡ Quickstart Unsloth can be used in two ways: through Unsloth Studio , the web UI, or through Unsloth Core , the code-based version. Each has different requirements. Unsloth Studio (web UI) Unsloth Studio works on Windows, Linux, WSL and macOS . CPU: Supported for chat inference only NVIDIA: Training works on RTX 30/40/50, Blackwell, DGX Spark, Station and more macOS: Currently supports chat only; MLX training is coming very soon AMD: Chat
title_zh: UnslothAI/Unsloth - 用于本地训练和运行 Qwen、DeepSeek、Gemma 等开源模型的统一 Web 界面。
summary_zh: GitHub项目unslothai/unsloth提供了一个统一的本地Web界面（Unsloth Studio），用于训练和运行诸如Qwen、DeepSeek、Gemma等开源模型。该项目支持在Windows、Linux和macOS系统上操作，涵盖文本、音频、嵌入、视觉等多种模型任务。，核心功能分为推理（Inference）和训练（Training）两大方面。在推理方面，用户能够搜索、下载并运行包括GGUF、LoRA适配器、safetensors在内的多种模型格式；支持将模型导出为GGUF、16位safetensors等格式；具备工具调用（tool calling）功能，可实现自我修复和网络搜索；提供代码执行能力，使LLM能够运行代码、处理数据并验证结果以提高答案准确性；可自动调整推理参数并自定义聊天模板；支持上传图像、音频、PDF、代码、DOCX等多种文件类型进行交互。，在训练方面，Unsloth显著提升了效率：可对500多种模型进行训练，速度提升最高达2倍，同时VRAM占用减少高达70%，且保证无精度损失。它支持全参数微调、预训练以及4位、16位和FP8训练。项目还提供可观测性功能，允许实时监控训练过程、跟踪损失和GPU使用情况，并自定义图表。其数据食谱（Data Recipes）功能可从PDF、CSV、DOCX等文件自动创建数据集，并通过可视化节点工作流编辑数据。此外，它集成了高效的强化学习库，对于GRPO、FP8等方法可减少80%的VRAM使用。当前已支持多GPU训练，并有重大改进即将推出。，项目提供两种使用方式：基于Web UI的Unsloth Studio和基于代码的Unsloth Core。Unsloth Studio在Windows、Linux、WSL和macOS上运行：CPU仅支持聊天推理；NVIDIA GPU（如RTX 30/40/50系列、Blackwell、DGX Spark等）支持训练；macOS目前仅支持聊天，MLX训练即将推出；AMD支持聊天功能。这为开发者和研究者提供了一个功能全面且高效的本地AI模型开发和实验平台。

title: langchain-ai/open-swe - An Open-Source Asynchronous Coding Agent
content: GitHub - langchain-ai/open-swe: An Open-Source Asynchronous Coding Agent · GitHub Skip to content You signed in with another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You signed out in another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You switched accounts on another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. Dismiss alert langchain-ai / open-swe Public Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 783 Star 5.9k main Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 597 Commits 597 Commits .github/ workflows .github/ workflows .vscode .vscode agent agent static static tests tests .codespellignore .codespellignore .gitignore .gitignore CUSTOMIZATION.md CUSTOMIZATION.md Dockerfile Dockerfile INSTALLATION.md INSTALLATION.md LICENSE LICENSE Makefile Makefile README.md README.md SECURITY.md SECURITY.md langgraph.json langgraph.json pyproject.toml pyproject.toml uv.lock uv.lock View all files Repository files navigation Open-source framework for building your org's internal coding agent. Elite engineering orgs like Stripe, Ramp, and Coinbase are building their own internal coding agents — Slackbots, CLIs, and web apps that meet engineers where they already work. These agents are connected to internal systems with the right context, permissioning, and safety boundaries to operate with minimal human oversight. Open SWE is the open-source version of this pattern. Built on LangGraph and Deep Agents , it gives you the same architecture those companies built internally: cloud sandboxes, Slack and Linear invocation, subagent orchestration, and automatic PR creation — ready to customize for your own codebase and workflows. Note 💬 Read the announcement blog post here Architecture Open SWE makes the same core architectural decisions as the best internal coding agents. Here's how it maps to the patterns described in this overview of Stripe's Minions, Ramp's Inspect, and Coinbase's Cloudbot: 1. Agent Harness — Composed on Deep Agents Rather than forking an existing agent or building from scratch, Open SWE composes on the Deep Agents framework — similar to how Ramp built on top of OpenCode. This gives you an upgrade path (pull in upstream improvements) while letting you customize the orchestration, tools, and middleware for your org. create_deep_agent ( model = "anthropic:claude-opus-4-6" , system_prompt = construct_system_prompt ( repo_dir , ...), tools = [ http_request , fetch_url , commit_and_open_pr , linear_comment , slack_thread_reply ], backend = sandbox_backend , middleware = [ ToolErrorMiddleware (), check_message_queue_before_model , ...], ) 2. Sandbox — Isolated Cloud Environments Every task runs in its own isolated cloud sandbox — a remote Linux environment with full shell access. The repo is cloned in, the agent gets full permissions, and the blast radius of any mistake is fully contained. No production access, no confirmat
title_zh: langchain-ai/open-swe - 一款开源异步编码智能体
summary_zh: Langchain-ai在GitHub上开源了Open SWE项目，这是一个异步编程智能体框架。该项目旨在为企业构建内部专用的编码助手（如Slack机器人、CLI工具或Web应用）提供开源基础，其设计模式参考了Stripe、Ramp、Coinbase等顶尖工程团队已内部实施的自有编码智能体系统。这些智能体能够接入企业内部系统，在恰当的上下文、权限控制与安全边界下运行，实现最小化人工干预的自动化编程任务。，Open SWE的核心架构基于LangGraph和Deep Agents框架构建，复现了上述公司内部系统的关键特性：云端沙箱隔离环境、通过Slack和Linear等平台触发任务、子智能体协调编排以及自动创建Pull Request。企业可在此基础上针对自身代码库与工作流进行定制化开发。，项目架构突出两大设计决策：一是采用Deep Agents框架作为智能体基础，而非从头开发或分叉现有智能体，这使得用户既能获得上游框架的功能迭代，又可自由定制编排逻辑、工具链与中间件；二是所有任务均在独立的云端沙箱中执行——每个任务都运行在具备完整shell访问权限的远程Linux环境中，代码库被克隆至沙箱内，智能体拥有完全操作权限，同时任何操作失误的影响范围都被严格限制在沙箱内部，避免了生产环境访问风险。，技术实现上，项目通过`create_deep_agent`函数配置智能体，支持指定模型（如Anthropic Claude Opus）、系统提示词构造、工具集集成（包括HTTP请求、提交PR、Linear评论、Slack回复等）、沙箱后端及多层中间件。这种架构既保证了企业级的安全性与可控性，又提供了高度的可扩展性，使工程团队能够快速部署适应自身开发流程的AI编程助手。

title: Claude Dispatch
summary_zh: 是Anthropic公司为其AI助手Claude推出的一项新功能，旨在通过智能任务分配与并行处理来提升复杂工作流的效率。该功能的核心是让用户能够将一项大型或复杂的任务分解成多个子任务，并自动将这些子任务分配给多个Claude实例同时处理，最后汇总结果。，其核心功能与价值主要体现在以下几个方面。首先，它实现了任务的自动化分解与并行执行。用户只需提出一个宏观请求，便能理解任务结构，将其拆分为逻辑上独立或可并行的步骤，并协调多个Claude“工作者”同时处理，这显著加快了处理速度，尤其适用于数据分析、内容创作、代码审查等涉及多步骤或大量文本处理的工作。，其次，它优化了资源利用与结果整合。系统能够根据子任务的性质和复杂度，智能地分配计算资源，并负责收集所有并行处理的结果，将其融合成一个连贯、完整的最终输出。这减轻了用户手动切分任务、管理多个对话窗口和整合信息的负担。，从技术特点看，展现了大型语言模型在任务规划与协调方面的高级能力。它不仅仅是简单的多实例调用，更涉及对任务本身的语义理解、逻辑拆解以及工作流编排。这可以被视为向更复杂的AI智能体（Agent）系统迈出的一步，其中LLM不仅负责生成内容，还承担了“项目经理”的角色。，该功能的推出，标志着AI助手正从处理单一、连续的对话，向管理复杂、并行的项目演进。它为用户，特别是开发者和企业用户，提供了处理高复杂度任务的强大工具，有望在研发、商业分析、内容生产等领域提升生产力。其底层实现可能结合了先进的提示工程与工作流引擎，是Anthropic在提升Claude实用性和竞争力方面的重要举措。
